class.name: GFValidationReport
class.description: GFValidationReport: 通用校验报告数据结构。 用于聚合 `GFValidationIssue`，提供错误/警告统计、健康状态、摘要、下一步建议 和字典序列化。报告不绑定具体配置、存档、节点或编辑器业务语义。

member.name: subject
member.description: 报告主题，例如资源名、模块名或调用方自定义域。

member.name: metadata
member.description: 可选元数据。框架不解释该字段。

tags.tag: metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined report metadata.

member.name: extra_fields
member.description: 额外报告字段。用于保留或附加调用方自己的统计数据。

tags.tag: extra_fields: Dictionary of caller-defined serialized report fields.

member.name: configure
member.signature: func configure(p_subject: String = "", p_metadata: Dictionary = {}) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 配置报告主题和元数据。

tags.tag: p_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined report metadata.
添加后的问题；输入无效时返回 null。
issue: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue or Dictionary issue payload.

member.name: add_info
member.signature: func add_info( kind: StringName, message: String, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:

tags.tag: issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_warning
member.signature: func add_warning( kind: StringName, message: String, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:

tags.tag: issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_error
member.signature: func add_error( kind: StringName, message: String, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:

tags.tag: issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_source_issue
member.signature: func add_source_issue( severity: Variant, kind: StringName, message: String, source_span: Variant, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 添加带源码定位的问题。

tags.tag: severity: 严重级别，可传入 Severity、int 或字符串。
severity: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue.Severity, int, String, or StringName.
source_span: Variant accepting GFSourceSpan or Dictionary span payload.
issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_source_info
member.signature: func add_source_info( kind: StringName, message: String, source_span: Variant, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 添加带源码定位的信息问题。

tags.tag: source_span: Variant accepting GFSourceSpan or Dictionary span payload.
issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_source_warning
member.signature: func add_source_warning( kind: StringName, message: String, source_span: Variant, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 添加带源码定位的警告问题。

tags.tag: source_span: Variant accepting GFSourceSpan or Dictionary span payload.
issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: add_source_error
member.signature: func add_source_error( kind: StringName, message: String, source_span: Variant, key: Variant = null, path: String = "", issue_metadata: Dictionary = {} ) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 添加带源码定位的错误问题。

tags.tag: source_span: Variant accepting GFSourceSpan or Dictionary span payload.
issue_metadata: Dictionary of caller-defined issue metadata.

member.name: merge
member.signature: func merge(source: Variant, include_metadata: bool = true) -> RefCounted:
member.description: 合并另一个报告或报告字典。

tags.tag: source: GFValidationReport 或包含 issues 的字典。
include_metadata: 为 true 时合并源报告 metadata。
source: Variant accepting GFValidationReport or Dictionary report payload.

member.name: to_dict
member.signature: func to_dict(additional_fields: Dictionary = {}, options: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:

tags.tag: additional_fields: 附加到输出中的调用方字段。
options: 可选输出控制，支持 include_subject、include_metadata、include_info_count、include_issue_count、include_empty_issue_fields、summary_subject、next_actions、fallback_action、no_action。
additional_fields: Dictionary of caller-defined serialized fields.
options: Dictionary controlling report serialization options.

member.name: is_ok
member.description: 检查报告是否没有错误。

member.name: is_healthy
member.description: 检查报告是否完全健康。

tags.tag: 没有错误和警告时返回 true。
return: Dictionary keyed by issue kind with integer counts.
subject_override: 临时覆盖报告主题。

member.name: get_next_action
member.signature: func get_next_action( action_map: Dictionary = {}, fallback_action: String = "Review the first reported issue.", no_action: String = "No action required." ) -> String:

tags.tag: action_map: 按问题类别映射的建议文本。
fallback_action: 存在问题但没有命中映射时返回的建议。
no_action: 没有问题时返回的建议。
action_map: Dictionary keyed by issue kind with action text values.
kinds: 为空时提升全部警告；否则只提升匹配类别。
